name: Muffins Using Quick Bread Mix
recipeInstructions:
1. Drain the pineapple and reserve the juice.
2. Add milk to the juice until you have a total of 3/4 cup.
3. Combine the egg with the milk mixture; set aside.
4. In a medium bowl, mix together the Quick Bread Mix, sugar, and orange rind.
5. Make a well in the center of the dry ingredients.
6. Add the milk mixture and pineapple to the dry ingredients, stirring just until moistened.
7. Spoon the batter into greased muffin pans, filling them about two-thirds full.
8. Bake at 400°F for 25 minutes.
Yield: 1 dozen
